flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Taft College rose 47% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $10.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Taft College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($615 → $780).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Taft College rose 323% between 2007 and 2010 (1.8k → 7.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Taft College rose 13% between 2007 and 2010 (55.6% → 62.9%).
